verses.first: Jai Ambe Gauri, Maiya Jai Shyama Gauri
verses.second: Tumko Nishdin Dhyavat, Hari Brahma Shivri || Jai Ambe Gauri ||

verses.first: Maang Sindoor Virajat, Teeko Mrigmad Ko
verses.second: Ujjwal Se Dou Naina, Chandravadan Neeko || Jai Ambe Gauri ||
Raktapushp Gal Mala, Kanthan Par Sajai || Jai Ambe Gauri ||

verses.first: Kehari Vahan Rajat, Khadg Khappar Dhari
verses.second: Sur-Nar-Munijan Sevat, Tinke Dukhahari || Jai Ambe Gauri ||
Kotik Chandra Divakar, Sam Rajat Jyoti || Jai Ambe Gauri ||
Dhumra Vilochan Naina, Nishdin Madmati || Jai Ambe Gauri ||

verses.first: Chand Mund Sanhare, Shonit Beej Hare
verses.second: Madhu Kaitabh Dou Mare, Sur Bhayaheen Kare || Jai Ambe Gauri ||
Aagam Nigam Bakhani, Tum Shiv Patrani || Jai Ambe Gauri ||

verses.first: Chaunsath Yogini Gavat, Nritya Karat Bhairon
verses.second: Bajat Taal Mridanga, Aru Bajat Damru || Jai Ambe Gauri ||

verses.first: Tum Ho Jag Ki Mata, Tum Hi Ho Bharta
verses.second: Bhaktan Ki Dukh Harta, Sukh Sampatti Karta || Jai Ambe Gauri ||

verses.first: Bhuja Char Ati Shobhit, Var Mudra Dhari
verses.second: Manvanchhit Phal Pavat, Sevat Nar Nari || Jai Ambe Gauri ||

verses.first: Kanchan Thal Virajat, Agar Kapoor Bati
verses.second: Malketu Mein Rajat, Koti Ratan Jyoti || Jai Ambe Gauri ||

verses.first: Shri Ambeji Ki Aarti, Jo Koi Nar Gave
verses.second: Kahat Shivanand Swami, Sukh Sampatti Pave || Jai Ambe Gauri ||
